Get to Know Me

Passionate About Building Reliable Digital Solutions

I am a dedicated Information Technology graduate with a strong interest in web development and IT support. I enjoy building modern, user-friendly web applications and solving technical problems that improve system performance and user experience.

I have hands-on experience developing full-stack web applications using technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, PHP Laravel, and MySQL. Through my academic projects, including an e-commerce system, I have learned how to design, develop, and deploy real-world applications step by step.

In addition to development, I am also passionate about IT support and system administration. I enjoy troubleshooting issues, managing systems, and ensuring that technology works efficiently and reliably for users.
